statement.p: Juliens annual property tax had been {\$4{,}115}\text{.} But he did some renovation to his house that added more square footage, and now the annual property tax is {\$5{,}000}\text{.} The county assesses property tax at a rate of {\$1.85} per square foot. How much area did Julien add to his home? Write an equation to model this scenario. There is no need to solve it.
